title: Strange World
description: The mod adds a new dimension called "Strange World," along with many other blocks, items, structures, and mobs.
body: This mod adds a new dimension called "Strange World." It adds new monsters: the Boo Monster, the Poop Zombie, and more mobs are coming soon. New biomes in the new dimension include the Poop Biome, the Boo Biome, the Cult Biome, which will feature a new village, and the Pavlovia Biome, which will also soon feature a friendly village. The new dimension, called "Strange World," also includes many new blocks, items, wood, stone, and ore, and adds new structures (there's only one structure so far). This mod may contain bugs. My mod is in early development, but I want to finish it. I'm tired of working on it, so there won't be an update anytime soon. If you want to suggest an idea for a mod or report a bug, please follow the link to my Discord server.
